gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the release-safe engine-probe helper, tests, and docs; it reported no findings and confirmed debug defaults, helper-local --release-safe behavior, bundle-template safety, and public-wrapper compatibility.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py (43 passed)
GPT-5.5 PR review returned no findings and manually confirmed release-safe payloads omit debug/runtime-only flags
what_changed: Added release-safe validation to the Databricks native engine-probe runs/submit helper so release-evidence job payload generation rejects debug-only engine_version overrides and non-native probe mode while preserving default adapter-debug behavior.
Documented release-safe Databricks engine-probe usage in the root, Databricks, and legacy module READMEs and covered the new guard with focused public-wrapper tests.
why: Native vLLM/SGLang probe evidence must come from real engine block managers with real engine versions; release job payloads should fail before submission when debug-only probe options would produce non-releaseable records.
